channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Neurostimulation shows promise for social communication in children with autism
item.description: A five-day intervention using accelerated continuous theta burst stimulation improved social communication in some children.

item.title: Dupixent Approved for Children with Urticaria
item.description: The FDA has approved Dupixent (dupilumab) to treat chronic spontaneous urticaria in children ages 2-11.

item.title: Study Supports Safety of Maternal RSV Vaccine
item.description: Initial data regarding hypertension remain under review. A more comprehensive study indicates no increased risk, according to Medscape Medical News.

item.title: Honor cultures and mental health: New research
item.description: A new study in the PsyCh Journal introduces 'atimiaphobia,' a psychological concept involving fear of losing honor or being shamed.
